LANDING.TITLE: Your restaurant, connected
LANDING.SUBTITLE: Guests book and order at the table; teams run service from one place.
LANDING.VALUE_DINE_IN: Order from your seat with a table code
LANDING.VALUE_STAFF: Dashboard and tools for your team
LANDING.SECTION_GUESTS_LEDE: Already seated? Enter your table name or open the link from the QR code on your table.
LANDING.SECTION_TEAM_LEDE: Need an account for your venue? Register first, then sign in from your restaurant below.
LANDING.SECTION_TEAM_HINT: Returning staff: pick your restaurant in the list, then use Login.
LANDING.AT_TABLE_HINT: Already at a table? Enter the name on your table (e.g. T01) or use the link from your table's QR code.
LANDING.TABLE_NOT_FOUND: No table found. Check the name on your table or scan the QR code.
LANDING.TABLE_MULTIPLE_HINT: More than one restaurant uses this table name. Choose yours.
LANDING.TABLE_LOOKUP_FAILED: Could not look up the table. Try again.

ORDERS_PUBLIC.TITLE: Take away & Home ordering
ORDERS_PUBLIC.SUBTITLE: Choose a restaurant to order for collection or delivery
ORDERS_PUBLIC.NO_TAKEAWAY: No restaurants with take-away ordering available at the moment.

DASHBOARD.TITLE: Dashboard
DASHBOARD.WELCOME_TEXT: Manage your business operations from here
DASHBOARD.BEVERAGES_DESC: Orders view for bar and drinks
DASHBOARD.WORKING_PLAN_DESC: Shift schedule for kitchen, bar and waiters
DASHBOARD.HELP_DESC: We're here for you. Report a bug, ask a question, or share an idea.
DASHBOARD.HELP_INVITE: Start a discussion for enhancements or open an issue — we'd love to hear from you.
DASHBOARD.MY_SHIFT_DESC_OFF: Clock in to record working hours
DASHBOARD.MY_SHIFT_DESC_ON: You are clocked in — open to clock out or view history
DASHBOARD.MY_SHIFT_OVERTIME: Longer than usual shift — open My shift

AUTH.REGISTER_FOR_PROVIDERS: Restaurant and business owners. Create your restaurant here to get your own staff dashboard, manage orders, tables, and reservations.
AUTH.REGISTER_GUEST_HINT: Just want to book a table or order at a restaurant? You don't need an account — use «Book a table» or the table name / QR field on the homepage.
AUTH.OTP_ENTER_CODE: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
AUTH.FORGOT_DESC: Enter your email address and we will send you a link to choose a new password.
AUTH.RESET_EMAIL_SENT: If an account exists for this email, you will receive instructions shortly.
AUTH.RESET_PASSWORD_DESC: Enter a strong password (at least 8 characters) that you have not reused elsewhere for this account.
AUTH.RESET_SUCCESS: Your password was updated. You can sign in now.
AUTH.RESET_TOKEN_MISSING: This reset link is missing or invalid. Request a new reset from the login page.

MENU.TITLE: Menu
MENU.ITEMS_ADDED_TO_ORDER: Order received! Items added to Order #{{orderId}}
MENU.NO_ACTIVE_ORDER_HINT: Add items from the menu below and place your order.
MENU.PIN_HINT: Ask your server for the 4-digit PIN
MENU.TABLE_CLOSED_MESSAGE: This table is not currently accepting orders. Please ask a member of staff for assistance.

PRODUCTS.TITLE: Products
PRODUCTS.FILL_REQUIRED_FIELDS: Please fill in product name and price.
PRODUCTS.PRICE_REQUIRED: Please enter a valid price (greater than 0).
PRODUCTS.TAX_OVERRIDE_HINT: Override the default tax for this product. Leave as default to use the tax set in Settings.
PRODUCTS.KITCHEN_STATION_HINT: Shown on kitchen or bar display by station when your restaurant uses prep stations in Settings.
PRODUCTS.AVAILABLE_FROM_HINT: Customer menu shows this product only from this date. Leave empty for no start limit.
PRODUCTS.AVAILABLE_UNTIL_HINT: Customer menu shows this product only until this date. Leave empty for no end limit.
PRODUCTS.NO_PRODUCTS_DESC: Add your first product to get started
PRODUCTS.COST_HINT: Used to calculate profit in reports.
PRODUCTS.DELETE_PRODUCT_CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"
PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_CREATED_BUT_IMAGE_FAILED: Product created but image upload failed
PRODUCTS.SELECT_CATEGORY_TO_MANAGE: Select a category to manage its subcategories
PRODUCTS.NO_SUBCATEGORIES_FOUND: No subcategories found for this category.
PRODUCTS.SEARCH_PLACEHOLDER: Search products by name, ingredients, category…
PRODUCTS.DELETE_SUBCATEGORY_CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to delete the subcategory '{{name}}'? Products in this subcategory will be left without a subcategory.
PRODUCTS.CUSTOMIZATIONS_HINT: Optional questions guests answer before adding this item to the cart (e.g. doneness, spice level). Shown on the table menu.
PRODUCTS.CUSTOMIZATIONS_AFTER_SAVE: Save the product first, then edit it again to add customization questions.
PRODUCTS.QUESTION_LABEL_PLACEHOLDER: e.g. How would you like your steak cooked?
PRODUCTS.QUESTION_CHOICE_MULTI: Allow multiple selections (e.g. several toppings or removals)
PRODUCTS.QUESTION_OPTIONS_REQUIRED: Add at least one option (one per line).
PRODUCTS.QUESTION_SCALE_INVALID: Maximum must be greater than minimum.
PRODUCTS.QUESTION_DELETE_CONFIRM: Remove customization "{{label}}"? Existing orders keep their saved answers.

CATALOG.TITLE: Product Catalog
CATALOG.SUBTITLE: Browse products from providers and add them to your menu
CATALOG.FAILED_TO_ADD: Failed to add product to menu
CATALOG.FAILED_TO_REMOVE: Failed to remove product from menu
CATALOG.NO_PRODUCTS_DESC: Try adjusting your filters or search terms

ORDERS.TITLE: Orders
ORDERS.NO_ORDERS_DESC: Orders will appear here when customers place them
ORDERS.FOCUS_TABLE_NO_ORDERS: No orders found for this table.
ORDERS.OPEN_MENU_LINK: Open public menu for this table (add products without PIN)
ORDERS.DELETE_ORDER_CONFIRM: Remove this order from the list and from book-keeping (reports)? It will no longer appear anywhere. This cannot be undone.
ORDERS.NO_UNPAID_ORDERS: No unpaid orders at this time
ORDERS.FINISH_ORDER_HELP: Every item is marked as served and the order is closed as paid in one step.
ORDERS.PAY_NOW_HINT: Record payment while the order is still in progress (kitchen statuses stay as they are).
ORDERS.PAY_NOW_HELP: Payment is recorded now. Line items keep their current kitchen status until you mark them served or use Finish.
ORDERS.REMOVE_ITEM_CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to remove this item?
ORDERS.CANCELLATION_REASON: Reason for cancellation (required for tax reporting):
ORDERS.REASON_REQUIRED: Reason is required when canceling ready items
ORDERS.REMOVAL_REASON: Reason for removal (required for audit and tax when removing ready/delivered items):
ORDERS.REMOVAL_REASON_REQUIRED: Reason is required when removing ready or delivered items
ORDERS.FAILED_TO_MARK_PAID: Failed to mark order as paid
ORDERS.INVOICE_OSS_PREFIX: Open source · Made with ♥ in Barcelona and Mexico

CUSTOMERS.TITLE: Customers (Invoice)
CUSTOMERS.NAME: Name
CUSTOMERS.BIRTH_DATE_HINT: Optional. For occasions or future CRM use; not printed on the tax invoice.
CUSTOMERS.SEARCH_PLACEHOLDER: Search by name, company, tax ID, email…
CUSTOMERS.NONE_DESC: Add customers that need a tax invoice with their company details.
CUSTOMERS.DELETE_CONFIRM: Delete {{name}}? Orders already linked will keep the saved data.

KITCHEN_DISPLAY.TITLE: Kitchen display
KITCHEN_DISPLAY.NO_ACTIVE_ORDERS_DESC: New orders will appear here when customers place them
KITCHEN_DISPLAY.TIMER_SETTINGS_DESC: Order card color changes after these minutes (green → yellow → orange → red).
KITCHEN_DISPLAY.TIMER_BAR_HINT: Wait time progress toward red threshold

MY_SHIFT.TITLE: My shift
MY_SHIFT.SUBTITLE: Clock in when you start work at the venue and clock out when you leave. Times are stored for payroll and reports.
MY_SHIFT.AUDIT_HINT: Each clock-in and clock-out records the network address seen by the server (e.g. restaurant Wi‑Fi vs home). This does not prove physical presence by itself, but helps spot unusual patterns.
MY_SHIFT.NO_HISTORY: No sessions in the last 30 days.
MY_SHIFT.OVERTIME_BODY: You have been clocked in for more than the usual {{hours}} hours. If you are still working, coordinate overtime with your manager and clock out when you finish.

REPORTS.TITLE: Sales & Revenue
REPORTS.SUBTITLE: Revenue analysis from paid orders
REPORTS.NO_DATA_DESC: Paid or completed orders in the selected range will appear here.
REPORTS.WORK_SESSIONS_HINT: UTC calendar days by start time. IP addresses are from the server’s view (useful when staff should use on-site Wi‑Fi).
REPORTS.WORK_SESSIONS_EMPTY: No clock-in records in this period.

TABLES.TITLE: Tables
TABLES.NAME: Name
TABLES.DELETE_FLOOR_CONFIRM: Delete this floor? Tables will be unassigned.
TABLES.CREATE_FIRST_FLOOR_DESC: Start by adding a floor to design your restaurant layout
TABLES.DELETE_TABLE_CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to delete this table?
TABLES.REASSIGN_AND_DELETE_MESSAGE: This table has orders. Choose another table to move its orders and reservations to, then the table will be deleted.
TABLES.CLOSE_TABLE_CONFIRM: Close table "{{name}}"? This will end the current session.

BOOK.TITLE: Book a table
BOOK.VIEW_CANCEL_HINT: You can view or cancel your reservation using the link below. Save this link or the confirmation token.
BOOK.ERROR_INVALID_LINK: Invalid booking link. Please use the link provided by the restaurant.
BOOK.PREPAYMENT_DEFAULT: A pre-payment may be required; it will be discounted from your meal.
BOOK.ARRIVAL_TOLERANCE_MINUTES: Please arrive within {{minutes}} minutes of your booking time.
BOOK.INVALID_PHONE: Enter a valid phone number (including country code if needed).
BOOK.VIEW_LINK_UNAVAILABLE: Open the link from your confirmation email to view or cancel this reservation.
BOOK.WEEK_GRID_HINT: Green slots are free for your party size. Red slots are fully booked. Grey slots are not bookable (closed, past, or outside service hours).
BOOK.PICK_SLOT: Please choose an available green time slot.
BOOK.SLOT_UNAVAILABLE: That time is no longer available. Pick another green slot.

FEEDBACK.TITLE: How was your visit?
FEEDBACK.INTRO: We would love to hear from you. Your rating and comments help us improve.
FEEDBACK.COMMENT_PLACEHOLDER: Tell us what went well or what we could do better
FEEDBACK.CONTACT_HINT: Leave your name, email or phone if you would like us to follow up.
FEEDBACK.SUBMIT_ERROR: Could not send feedback. Please try again later.
FEEDBACK.VALIDATION_ERROR: Please check your input and try again.
FEEDBACK.RATE_LIMIT: Too many submissions. Please try again in a little while.
FEEDBACK.THANK_YOU_DETAIL: We appreciate you taking the time to share your feedback.
FEEDBACK.OPEN_GOOGLE_REVIEW: Leave a public review on Google
FEEDBACK.QR_CARD_HINT: Guests scan this code to open your public feedback form. Use Print QR for a clean page to put on tables or near the register.

RESERVATIONS.TITLE: Reservations
RESERVATIONS.CLIENT_NOTES_PLACEHOLDER: e.g. dietary requirements, high chair, outdoor seating
RESERVATIONS.RESERVATION_NOTES_PLACEHOLDER: e.g. We will arrive with a baby stroller
RESERVATIONS.MODAL_DATE_TIME_HINT: Same details as the public booking page: pick date and time, party size, then contact fields. Staff use calendar/time inputs here; guests use the week grid on /book.
RESERVATIONS.PREFILL_NONE: No previous reservation found for this phone.
RESERVATIONS.NO_AVAILABLE_TABLES: No available tables for this party size.
RESERVATIONS.CANCEL_CONFIRM_MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to cancel this reservation?
RESERVATIONS.NO_SHOW_CONFIRM_MESSAGE: The guest did not show up. This will free the table and record the no-show.
RESERVATIONS.REMINDER_SENT_EMAIL_AND_WHATSAPP: Reminder sent by email and WhatsApp
RESERVATIONS.ERROR_DATE_TIME_REQUIRED: Please choose a date and time.
RESERVATIONS.ERROR_PARTY_SIZE_RANGE: Party size must be between 1 and 20.
RESERVATIONS.ERROR_MISSING_TOKEN: Missing reservation token. Use the link from your confirmation.
RESERVATIONS.ERROR_NOT_FOUND: Reservation not found or link expired.
RESERVATIONS.UPCOMING_NO_TABLE: You have {{count}} upcoming reservation(s) today with no table assigned.
RESERVATIONS.TABLE_UPCOMING: Table {{table}} has an upcoming reservation at {{time}} ({{name}}). Seat here anyway?
RESERVATIONS.ARRIVAL_TOLERANCE_MINUTES: Please arrive within {{minutes}} minutes of your booking time.
RESERVATIONS.NOTIFY_DELAY: Notify us if you will be late
RESERVATIONS.NOTIFY_DELAY_PLACEHOLDER: e.g. We will arrive 1 hour late
RESERVATIONS.DELAY_SENT: Delay notice sent. We will be informed.
RESERVATIONS.DELAY_RATE_LIMITED: Too many delay notices were sent. Please try again later.

WORKING_PLAN.TITLE: Working plan
WORKING_PLAN.CALENDAR_LEGEND: Gray = closed day. Red = staffing issue. Green = matches required headcount. Shifts are listed under each date.
WORKING_PLAN.NO_SHIFTS: No shifts in this period. Add a shift to build your working plan.
WORKING_PLAN.LABEL: Label
WORKING_PLAN.DELETE_CONFIRM: Remove this shift from the schedule?
WORKING_PLAN.EXPORT_NO_STAFF_HINT: Add team accounts with owner, admin, kitchen, bar, waiter, or receptionist roles to choose a worker and export.
WORKING_PLAN.EXPORT_MONTH_HINT: Downloads this worker’s shifts for {{month}} (same calendar month as the grid, or the month that contains the Monday of the week in week view).
WORKING_PLAN.BULK_MONTH_SCOPE: Target calendar month: {{month}} (same rules as Excel export — calendar month in calendar view, or the month of the week range in week view).
WORKING_PLAN.BULK_SKIP_EXISTING: Skip days that already have a shift for this person
WORKING_PLAN.BULK_SKIP_EXISTING_HINT: Preserves one-off edits and rotations. Turn off to add an extra shift on those days too.
WORKING_PLAN.BULK_DONE: Added {{created}} shift(s). Skipped {{skipped}} day(s) that already had a shift.
WORKING_PLAN.BULK_ERR_TIMES: Start time must be before end time.

SETTINGS.TITLE: Settings
SETTINGS.SUBTITLE: Manage your business information and branding
SETTINGS.UI_MODULES_HINT: Turn off areas your team does not use. They disappear from the sidebar and dashboard; opening a direct link sends users to the dashboard. You can re-enable any module here anytime.
SETTINGS.UI_MODULE_TABLES_DESC: Table map, seating, and canvas editor.
SETTINGS.UI_MODULE_PROVIDERS_DESC: Browse and import products from linked providers.
SETTINGS.UI_MODULE_RESERVATIONS_DESC: Reservation list and guest feedback inbox.
SETTINGS.UI_MODULE_KITCHEN_BAR_DESC: KDS-style order displays for kitchen and beverages.
SETTINGS.UPLOAD_LOGO_HINT: Recommended: Square image, max 2MB (JPG, PNG, WebP, AVIF, SVG)
SETTINGS.HEADER_BACKGROUND_HINT: Image for the hero header on book, menu and reservation pages. JPG, PNG, WebP or AVIF.
SETTINGS.DESCRIPTION_PLACEHOLDER: A brief description of your business...
SETTINGS.PUBLIC_BACKGROUND_COLOR_HINT: Background color for book, menu and reservation pages. Use hex (e.g. #1E22AA) or the preset.
SETTINGS.TIMEZONE_NOT_SET: No timezone configured. UTC will be used for reservation time validation.
SETTINGS.CONTACT_INFO_SUBTITLE: How customers can reach your business
SETTINGS.PUBLIC_GOOGLE_REVIEW_PLACEHOLDER: https://g.page/.../review or Google Maps review URL
SETTINGS.PUBLIC_GOOGLE_REVIEW_HINT: Shown on the thank-you page after guests submit private feedback so they can leave a public Google review.
SETTINGS.PUBLIC_GOOGLE_MAPS_PLACEHOLDER: https://maps.app.goo.gl/... or Share link from Google Maps
SETTINGS.PUBLIC_GOOGLE_MAPS_HINT: Optional. Shown on the booking page, reservation view, and feedback page so guests can open your location in Google Maps. Use Share → Copy link from your Business Profile or Maps listing (not the same as the review link).
SETTINGS.DEFAULT_TAX_HINT: Applied to products unless overridden per product.
SETTINGS.TAXES_SUBTITLE: Manage tax rates and validity periods. Prices are tax-inclusive.
SETTINGS.KITCHEN_STATIONS_SUBTITLE: Define stations (e.g. grill, cold, desserts, bar) and map products. The kitchen and bar displays can filter by station. Unmapped products use the defaults below by category (food vs beverages).
SETTINGS.CONFIRM_DELETE_TAX: Delete this tax? Products using it will fall back to default tax.
SETTINGS.PROVIDERS_SUBTITLE: Add your own suppliers and link products (e.g. supplies not on the menu).
SETTINGS.OPENING_HOURS_SUBTITLE: Set your business hours for each day of the week
SETTINGS.OPENING_HOURS_HINT: Set your business hours for each day of the week. You can add a break between shifts.
SETTINGS.CURRENCY_HINT: ISO 4217 code for prices (products, menu, orders, reports). Use the code your payment provider expects (e.g. EUR, USD, MXN).
SETTINGS.LANGUAGE_HINT: Applies to public menu and admin UI by default.
SETTINGS.STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_HINT: Your Stripe publishable key (starts with pk_test_ or pk_live_)
SETTINGS.STRIPE_SECRET_PLACEHOLDER: sk_test_... or leave blank to keep current
SETTINGS.STRIPE_SECRET_HINT: Your Stripe secret key (starts with sk_test_ or sk_live_). Leave blank to keep current value.
SETTINGS.REVOLUT_MERCHANT_SECRET_HINT: Merchant secret from Revolut Business. Leave blank to keep current. Enables Pay with Revolut on the customer menu.
SETTINGS.IMMEDIATE_PAYMENT_HINT: When enabled, customers must pay to place an order.
SETTINGS.TIP_PRESETS_HINT: Up to four percentages shown when staff marks an order paid (e.g. 5, 10, 15, 20). Set all to zero to hide tips.
SETTINGS.TIP_TAX_RATE_HINT: Used only on printed invoices to split the tip into net and VAT (0 = no VAT on tip). Menu prices stay tax-inclusive.
SETTINGS.TRANSLATIONS_SUBTITLE: Manage translations for your menu and business information
SETTINGS.DATA_EXPORT_DESC: ZIP file with JSON: business settings, staff (no passwords), menu, orders, reservations, translations, and inventory. Payment and SMTP secrets are redacted in the export.
SETTINGS.DATA_EXPORT_FAILED: Could not build the export. Please try again.
SETTINGS.DANGER_ZONE_DESC: Deleting your restaurant removes all orders, reservations, staff accounts, uploaded images, and related data. This cannot be undone.
SETTINGS.PURGE_CONFIRM_LABEL: Type your business name exactly to confirm
SETTINGS.PURGE_FAILED: Could not delete the restaurant. Check the name matches exactly.
SETTINGS.SECURITY_SUBTITLE: Optional two-factor authentication (OTP) for your account
SETTINGS.OTP_DESCRIPTION: Add an extra layer of security by requiring a one-time code from an authenticator app (e.g. Google Authenticator) when signing in.
SETTINGS.OTP_SCAN_OR_ENTER: Add this key to your authenticator app
SETTINGS.OTP_ADD_TO_APP: Open Google Authenticator or another TOTP app and add this secret key (or scan the QR code if your app supports it).
SETTINGS.OTP_ENTER_CODE: Enter the 6-digit code from your app to enable
SETTINGS.OTP_ENABLED: Two-factor authentication (OTP) is enabled. You will need to enter a code from your authenticator app when signing in.
SETTINGS.OTP_DISABLE_ENTER_CODE: Enter your current OTP code to disable
SETTINGS.LOCATION_VERIFICATION_DESC: Flag orders placed from outside your restaurant's location
SETTINGS.ENABLE_LOCATION_CHECK_HINT: Orders from outside the radius will be flagged for review
SETTINGS.LOCATION_RADIUS_HINT: Orders outside this radius will be flagged
SETTINGS.RESERVATIONS_SUBTITLE: Pre-payment, policies and reminders for table reservations
SETTINGS.PREPAYMENT_WHOLE_AMOUNT_LABEL: Amount (this currency has no fractional unit in the POS)
SETTINGS.RESERVATION_PREPAYMENT_HINT: Charged when the customer confirms the reservation. Enter the whole amount and the minor part separately (e.g. euros and cents). Stored in the smallest currency unit, like menu prices. Set both to 0 to disable. Currency is chosen under Payment settings.
SETTINGS.RESERVATION_PREPAYMENT_TEXT_PLACEHOLDER: Optional text shown to customers (e.g. This amount is discounted from your meal.)
SETTINGS.RESERVATION_PREPAYMENT_TEXT_HINT: Shown on the booking page when pre-payment is set.
SETTINGS.RESERVATION_CANCELLATION_POLICY_PLACEHOL: e.g. Free cancellation up to 24h before. Later cancellations may be charged.
SETTINGS.RESERVATION_ARRIVAL_TOLERANCE_HINT: How long we hold the table after the booked time (e.g. 15).
SETTINGS.RESERVATION_AVG_TABLE_TURN_HINT: Typical time a party occupies a table after seating. Used to plan when that table can be booked again. Leave empty to use a simple same-day block (no turn window).
SETTINGS.RESERVATION_SLOT_MINUTES_HINT: Interval between offered start times on the public booking grid (e.g. 15 or 30). Leave empty or 0 for 15-minute steps.
SETTINGS.RESERVATION_WALK_IN_TABLES_HINT: Number of tables kept out of online reservation capacity so you can seat walk-in guests. Smallest tables are withheld first.
SETTINGS.REMINDER_SCHEDULE_DESC: Choose which reminders to send before a reservation. Use “Send reminder” from the reservations list, or set up a cron job to automate.
SETTINGS.RESERVATION_REMINDER_24H_HINT: When enabled, a reminder can be sent (manually or via automation) one day before the booking.
SETTINGS.RESERVATION_REMINDER_2H_HINT: When enabled, a reminder can be sent (manually or via automation) two hours before the booking.
SETTINGS.EMAIL_SETTINGS_SUBTITLE: Configure SMTP for transactional emails (e.g. reservation confirmations). Leave empty to use the global server configuration.
SETTINGS.RESERVATION_CONFIRMATION_EMAIL_DESC: Write the email in plain text. Insert values by wrapping an allowed name in double curly braces (for example customer_name). Only those names are filled in—no code or scripts. Leave blank to use the built-in default.
SETTINGS.RESERVATION_CONFIRMATION_SUBJECT_PLACEHO: e.g. We have reserved a table for you
SETTINGS.RESERVATION_CONFIRMATION_BODY_HINT: Allowed names (wrap each in double curly braces): restaurant_name, customer_name, date, time, party_size, reservation_url, reservation_link_block_html (clickable link in HTML emails; empty if there is no self-service link), cancellation_policy, prepayment_text, prepayment_notice, dress_code, arrival_note, restaurant_phone, restaurant_email, restaurant_contact_block_html (phone and email block with tel/mailto in HTML and plain lines in text; empty if both phone and email are unset). Use cancellation_policy and similar to pull text from the Reservations settings section.

PAYMENTS.HOW_TO_PAY: How would you like to pay?
PAYMENTS.PAY_ONLINE_DESC: Pay securely with your card now
PAYMENTS.PAY_WITH_REVOLUT_DESC: Pay via Revolut (card, Revolut Pay, etc.)
PAYMENTS.SUCCESS_MESSAGE: Thank you. Your payment has been received.
PAYMENTS.PAY_CARD_TERMINAL_DESC: A waiter will bring the card terminal
PAYMENTS.PAY_CASH_DESC: A waiter will come to collect payment
PAYMENTS.CALL_WAITER_DESC: Need help or have a question?
PAYMENTS.WAITER_CALLED_WAIT: Waiter has been called, please wait...
PAYMENTS.MESSAGE_HINT: Add an optional note for the staff (e.g. questions, observations).
PAYMENTS.WAITER_ON_WAY_DESC: A member of staff will be with you shortly.
PAYMENTS.PAYMENT_REQUESTED_DESC: A waiter will come to your table to process the payment.

ERRORS.GENERIC: Something went wrong. Please try again.
ERRORS.FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to do this
ERRORS.NETWORK: Network error. Please check your connection.

ITEMS.NO_ITEMS_DESC: Add your first item to start tracking inventory
ITEMS.NAME: Name
ITEMS.DELETE_CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"

SUPPLIERS.TITLE: Suppliers
SUPPLIERS.NO_SUPPLIERS_DESC: Add your first supplier to get started
SUPPLIERS.NAME: Name
SUPPLIERS.DELETE_CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"

PURCHASE_ORDERS.TITLE: Purchase Orders
PURCHASE_ORDERS.NO_ORDERS_DESC: Create your first purchase order to get started
PURCHASE_ORDERS.NO_ITEMS: No items added yet. Click "Add Item" to start.

USERS.TITLE: User Management
USERS.CO_OWNER_HINT: Owners can assign the Owner role to another staff member (shared ownership). New accounts cannot be created as owner from here.
USERS.DELETE_CONFIRM_MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
